id: transition
title: "Transition deal status"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Transition deal status"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/api/v1/deals/{id}/status"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Moves a deal to the requested target status if the transition is permitted.
